Text.Page:
More trouble.

Kunchara make big...what is word? In-can-tay-shun. Put big word on paper. Put paper on axe. Wham! Swing harder.

Go find {@LinkCreature:218#1027$$Takucha}. No charms for Tukarus!

Oooh, yes. Kunchara's tent burn, but big wind blow tent away, put fire out. Takucha tried to get charms, but Tukarus hit hard. See scar?

Tukarus give all charms to {@LinkCreature:18#11#metal tribe}...the big ones with wheels.

Good! Very good! No charms for Tukarus, and golems no get charms either! Wise .

You would make good shaman!
Metal tribe? Takucha means golems. Golems with charms? Wham! Very strong.
